steps.title: Undo the subtraction
steps.content: The equation is $q-29r=s$, and the goal is to isolate $q$. Since $29r$ is being subtracted from $q$, add $29r$ to both sides.

steps.title: Match the isolated form
steps.content: $$q-29r+29r=s+29r$$ $$q=s+29r$$ This matches B. An incorrect response keeps the subtraction instead of undoing it, and the other choices change the equation's structure.
